case_title: HOANG NGUYEN VS. ENTRA DEFAULT SOLUTIONS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ENTRA DEFAULT SOLUTIONS, LLC, BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES, CAM XV TRUST NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO (1) ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT ESTOPPED FROM BRINGING THIS ACTION UNDER HAMILTON V. GREENWICH INVESTORS (2011) 195 CAL.APP.4TH 1602; (2) TO ALLEGE FACTS IN GOOD FAITH (AND IN LIGHT OF EX.12 TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE) SHOWING THAT NO CONTACT PRE-RECORDATION OF NOD WAS MADE AND THAT NO CONTACT HAS BEEN MADE SINCE, I.E. TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT HBOR REMEDY OF INJUNCTION IS NOT MOOT. MOTION AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S CHALLENGE TO DEFENDANT'S AUTHORITY TO FORECLOSE IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT STANDING TO CHALLENGE DEFENDANTS' AUTHORITY PRE-FORECLOSURE. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO AMEND. ALL PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B IN FUTURE. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL RESULT IN MOTION BEING TAKEN OFF CALENDAR OR TREATED AS UNOPPOSED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder Of Defendants To Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Seth Cox, 310-640-3070 for Defendants/Moving parties Enrta Deault Solutions, LLC, BSI Financial Services and Cam XV trust.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC. Notice Of Joinder And Joinder Of Defendants To Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Seth Cox, 310-640-3070 for Defendants/Moving parties Enrta Deault Solutions, LLC, BSI Financial Services and Cam XV trust.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ENTRA DEFAULT SOLUTIONS, LLC, BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES, CAM XV TRUST Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED.
Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing that Plaintiff is not estopped from bringing this action under Hamilton v. Greenwich Investors (2011) 195 Cal.App.4th 1602; (2) to allege facts in good faith (and in light of Ex.12 to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice) showing that no contact pre-recordation of NOD was made and that no contact has been made since, i.e. to allege facts showing that HBOR remedy of injunction is not moot.
Motion as to all causes of action based on Plaintiff's challenge to Defendant's authority to foreclose is GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiff has not standing to challenge Defendants' authority pre-foreclosure.
Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to amend.
All parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so will result in motion being taken off calendar or treated as unopposed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
